sentence: go to en.wikipedia.org, search for Bezier curve, and open the article

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/

workflow.name: On Wikipedia Homepage
workflow.description: Search for a specific topic on Wikipedia.
triggers: If the current URL contains en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Main_Page
If a search box with placeholder 'Search Wikipedia' is visible
actions: Type 'Bezier curve' into the search box with placeholder 'Search Wikipedia'

workflow.name: On Search Results Or Article Page
workflow.description: Confirm the search navigated to the Bezier curve article page, or click it if on search results.
triggers: If the current URL contains en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bezier_curve
If the current URL contains en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:Search
actions: If the current URL contains en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:Search, click the link with text 'Bezier curve'

workflow.name: Bezier Curve Article Open
workflow.description: The Bezier curve article is successfully open.
triggers: If the current URL contains en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bezier_curve
actions: Terminate: The Bezier curve article is open

state_names: On Search Results Or Article Page

sentence: go to en.wikipedia.org, search for Bezier curve, and open the article

triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/

workflow.name: On Wikipedia Homepage
workflow.description: Search for a specific topic on Wikipedia.

If a search box with placeholder 'Search Wikipedia' is visible

actions: If the current URL contains en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:Search, click the link with text 'Bezier curve'

If a heading with text 'Bezier curve' is visible

state_names: On Search Results Or Article Page

sentence: go to the-internet.herokuapp.com/login and log in with username tomsmith and password SuperSecretPassword!

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab and navigate to the login page.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/

workflow.name: On Login Page
workflow.description: Enter the provided username and password into the login form and submit.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/login
If an input field with ID 'username' is visible
If an input field with ID 'password' is visible
actions: Type 'tomsmith' into the input field with ID 'username'
Type 'SuperSecretPassword!' into the input field with ID 'password'

workflow.name: Login Successful
workflow.description: Confirm that the login was successful by checking for the secure area message.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/secure
If a div with class 'flash success' containing text 'You logged into a secure area!' is visible

sentence: go to the-internet.herokuapp.com/login and log in with username tomsmith and password SuperSecretPassword!

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/

workflow.name: On Login Page
workflow.description: Enter username and password, then click the login button.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/login
If a text input with ID 'username' is visible
If a text input with ID 'password' is visible
actions: Type 'tomsmith' into the text input with ID 'username'
Type 'SuperSecretPassword!' into the text input with ID 'password'

workflow.name: Logged In Successfully
workflow.description: Confirm that the login was successful and the secure area is reached.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/secure
If a div with ID 'flash' contains the text 'You logged into a secure area!'

sentence: go to the-internet.herokuapp.com/dynamic_loading/2, click Start, and wait for the hidden text to appear

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/

workflow.name: On Dynamic Loading Page
workflow.description: Click the 'Start' button to initiate the dynamic loading.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/dynamic_loading/2
If a button with text 'Start' is visible

workflow.name: Waiting for Hidden Text
workflow.description: Wait for the loading process to complete and the hidden text to appear.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/dynamic_loading/2
If text 'Loading...' is visible

workflow.name: Hidden Text Appeared
workflow.description: Confirm that the hidden text 'Hello World!' has appeared.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/dynamic_loading/2
If text 'Hello World!' is visible
actions: Terminate: The hidden text has appeared.

lint_issues.message: Empty actions with a wait/verification-sounding name -- looks like an intentional 'sit here until something external changes' state. Confirm that's what you meant.

sentence: go to the-internet.herokuapp.com/dynamic_loading/2, click Start, and wait for the hidden text to appear

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/

workflow.name: On Dynamic Loading Page
workflow.description: Identify the dynamic loading page and click the 'Start' button.

If a button with text 'Start' is visible

workflow.name: Hidden Text Appeared

sentence: go to the-internet.herokuapp.com/checkboxes and make sure both checkboxes are checked

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/

workflow.name: On Checkboxes Page - Checkbox 1 Unchecked
workflow.description: Click checkbox 1 if it is currently unchecked.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/checkboxes
If the checkbox labeled 'checkbox 1' is visible and unchecked

workflow.name: On Checkboxes Page - Checkbox 2 Unchecked
workflow.description: Click checkbox 2 if it is currently unchecked.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/checkboxes
If the checkbox labeled 'checkbox 2' is visible and unchecked

workflow.name: Both Checkboxes Checked
workflow.description: Confirm both checkboxes are now checked.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/checkboxes
If the checkbox labeled 'checkbox 1' is visible and checked
If the checkbox labeled 'checkbox 2' is visible and checked

sentence: go to the-internet.herokuapp.com/checkboxes and make sure both checkboxes are checked

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/

workflow.name: Ensure Checkbox 1 is Checked
workflow.description: Check if the first checkbox is unchecked and click it if necessary.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/checkboxes
If a checkbox with the text 'checkbox 1' is visible and unchecked
actions: Click the checkbox with the text 'checkbox 1'

workflow.name: Ensure Checkbox 2 is Checked
workflow.description: Check if the second checkbox is unchecked and click it if necessary.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/checkboxes
If a checkbox with the text 'checkbox 2' is visible and unchecked
actions: Click the checkbox with the text 'checkbox 2'

workflow.name: Both Checkboxes Checked
workflow.description: Confirm that both checkboxes are now checked.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/checkboxes
If a checkbox with the text 'checkbox 1' is visible and checked
If a checkbox with the text 'checkbox 2' is visible and checked
